title: Accidentally deleted an App that was in development

posts.author: Doka (Dominik Kukovec)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone.

One of our team members accidentally deleted an App that we have under Developers → Apps.
Is there a way to restore it, or should we just re-create the app?
We would prefer to restore it, since we submitted this app for monetization approval.

Cheers.
